title: Robert Williams
compiled_truth: Robert Williams is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-04), Robert Williams sent 36 and received 871 emails, totalling 907 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vicki Sharp](people/vicki-sharp) (16), [Richard Sanders](people/richard-sanders) (14), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (13), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (12), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (8).
